## Verification

<!-- Commands run, screenshots, logs, or other evidence. -->

- [ ] Relevant automated checks are listed with results.
- [ ] Local security preflight ran, or the reason it was not applicable is stated.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots or screen recordings.
- [ ] UI changes include before/after evidence when the change modifies existing visuals.
- [ ] If screenshots are not relevant, the reason is stated.

## Visual Evidence

For UI changes, include desktop and mobile evidence. Prefer before/after pairs
when changing existing screens. Use only public-safe local demo content.

## Security and Operations

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, real account IDs, or unsafe examples are included.
- [ ] Public-facing docs/examples use obviously fake values only.
- [ ] This work used a dedicated branch or worktree; no shared mutable branch was used.
- [ ] Security, cost, deployment, and observability impacts were considered.
- [ ] `docs/threat-model.md` or an ADR was updated if boundaries, data flows, hosting, or security posture changed.
- [ ] Local-only tooling config remains ignored and untracked.
